params.claimId: The ID of the settled claim

returns._0: claimId The ID of the newly created claim
The version number ( 0 if no controller )

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

params.claimId: The ID of the claim to settle

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

params._newBountyToken: The address of the new ERC20 token

params.stakeAmount: Amount of stake to commit to this vote
params.support: true for pass, false for fail

DEFAULT_REPUTATION_SCORE().notice: Default reputation for users without a score (100% = 1.0x).

DEFAULT_REWARD_PERCENT().notice: Default share of slashed stake distributed to winners.

DEFAULT_SLASH_PERCENT().notice: Default percentage of losing raw stake that is slashed.

DEFAULT_VERIFICATION_WINDOW_DURATION().notice: Default verification window for new claims.

MIN_VERIFICATION_WINDOW_DURATION().notice: Governance bounds for verification window duration.

TOKEN_DECIMALS_MULTIPLIER().notice: Fixed-point precision used by token amounts and reputation scores.

bountyToken().notice: Token contract for staking and rewards

claimSettlementRewards(uint256).notice: Claim rewards for winning a vote

createClaim(string).notice: Create a new claim for verification

defaultReputationScore().notice: Default reputation for users without a score (100% = 1.0)

emergencyPause().notice: Emergency pause function (available to emergency admin even when governance disabled)

hasGovernanceRights(address).notice: Check if address has governance rights

previewEffectiveStake(address,uint256).notice: Preview the effective stake for a user

requestGovernanceAddressUpdate(uint8,add.notice: Request address parameter update through governance

requestGovernanceParameterUpdate(uint8,u.notice: Request a parameter update through governance

setMinStakeAmount(uint256).notice: Update minimum stake amount (governance or admin)

setSettlementThresholdPercent(uint256).notice: Update settlement threshold percentage (governance or admin)

setVerificationWindowDuration(uint256).notice: Update verification window duration (governance or admin)

settleClaim(uint256).notice: Settle a claim after verification window closes

stake(uint256).notice: Stake tokens to participate in verification

updateBountyToken(address).notice: Safely migrates the primary payment bounty token

vote(uint256,bool,uint256).notice: Vote on a claim with reputation-weighted stake

withdrawStake(uint256).notice: Withdraw available stake (not locked in active claims)
